---
title: "Home"
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header { display: none !important; }
</style>

<div class="page-container">

<section class="hero">
  <img src="headshot.jpg" style="width:350px; height:350px; border-radius:50%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top; margin-top:1rem;">
  <div>
    <span class="hero-tag">Mixed Methods · Public Policy · Arts & Culture</span>
    <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
      <h1 class="hero-name">Haedodam Kim</h1>
      <p style="font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:22px; color:#1a1a1a; margin:0;">Researcher who tells stories with data</p>
    </div>
    <p class="hero-desc">I combine interviews, statistical analysis in R, and data visualization to produce findings that get used — with a focus on the financial, labor, and policy conditions that support long-term sustainability in the arts sector.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a class="btn-primary" href="Resume_Haedodam_Kim.pdf" target="_blank">Resume</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="skills-row">
  <span class="skill-tag">R · tidyverse · fixest</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Panel Regression</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Fixed Effects</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Qualitative Interviews</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">IRB Compliance</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Data Visualization</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Git · GitHub</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Policy Briefs</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Multi-stakeholder Coordination</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Workstream Management</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Microsoft Office</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Google Workspace</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Korean · English</span>
</div>

<div class="edu-section">
  <p class="section-label">Education</p>
  <div class="edu-grid">
    <div>
      <p class="edu-degree">M.S. Civic Analytics</p>
      <p class="edu-school">University of Illinois Chicago</p>
      <p class="edu-year">Chicago, IL · 2026</p>
      <p class="edu-honors">Laurette Kirstein Scholarship<br>Chicago Consular Corps Grant</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p class="edu-degree">B.A. Theatre</p>
      <p class="edu-school">National Institute for Lifelong Education</p>
      <p class="edu-year">South Korea · 2021</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p class="edu-degree">A.F.A. Theatre</p>
      <p class="edu-school">Seoul Institute of the Arts</p>
      <p class="edu-year">South Korea · 2019</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="work-section">
  <p class="section-label">Work Experience</p>

  <div class="work-item">
    <div class="work-header">
      <div>
        <p class="work-title">Graduate Research Assistant</p>
        <p class="work-org">Office of Social Science Research (OSSR), University of Illinois Chicago</p>
      </div>
      <p class="work-period">Aug 2025 – May 2026</p>
    </div>
    <ul class="work-bullets">
      <li>Led 8 cultural and educational programs engaging 160+ participants through a federally funded initiative.</li>
      <li>Standardized participant surveys across all programs to support program evaluation and federal reporting.</li>
      <li>Established a monthly newsletter reaching 350+ subscribers, expanding engagement beyond the university community.</li>
      <li>Expanded university and community partnerships, increasing participation and supporting 2 joint cultural events.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="work-item">
    <div class="work-header">
      <div>
        <p class="work-title">Research Assistant</p>
        <p class="work-org">College of Engineering, University of Illinois Chicago</p>
      </div>
      <p class="work-period">Jan 2025 – Aug 2025</p>
    </div>
    <ul class="work-bullets">
      <li>Managed longitudinal biometric and survey data collection for a NIOSH-funded study, maintaining IRB compliance and data quality.</li>
      <li>Recruited 15 Korean American home care workers and maintained 90%+ retention through bilingual participant support.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="work-item">
    <div class="work-header">
      <div>
        <p class="work-title">Researcher & Project Manager</p>
        <p class="work-org">Korea National University of Arts</p>
      </div>
      <p class="work-period">Jun 2021 – Dec 2022</p>
    </div>
    <ul class="work-bullets">
      <li>Conducted interviews with 6 theatre organizations to assess shared storage solutions for environmental sustainability.</li>
      <li>Produced a 141-page policy report that informed infrastructure planning by the Seoul Metropolitan Government.</li>
      <li>Promoted to Project Manager to oversee a $1M city-funded sustainability initiative.</li>
      <li>Coordinated stakeholders across government, academia, and the arts sector to support project implementation.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>

<div id="projects">
  <p class="section-label">Selected Projects</p>

  <a href="projects/01-self-reliance.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
  <div class="proj-card">
    <span class="proj-num">01</span>
    <div>
      <span class="featured-badge">Featured</span>&nbsp;
      <span class="conf-badge">AAAE 47th Annual Conference · May 2026</span>
      <p class="proj-title">Organizational Capacity as a Policy Intervention Point: Financial Sustainability in U.S. Nonprofit Theater Organizations</p>
      <p class="proj-sub">What began as a Chicago-focused independent study grew into a national analysis — starting with in-depth interviews with 5 local theater organizations, then expanding to quantitative analysis of 457 U.S. nonprofits to examine how revenue structures and organizational capacity shape financial sustainability.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag tag-blue">Mixed Methods Research</span>
        <span class="proj-tag tag-amber">Regression · In-Depth Interviews</span>
        <span class="proj-tag tag-gray">Nonprofit Finance · Arts Policy</span>
        <span class="proj-tag tag-teal">R</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <span class="proj-arrow">→</span>
  </div>
</a>

  <a href="projects/02-ppma.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
  <div class="proj-card">
    <span class="proj-num">02</span>
    <div>
      <span class="team-badge">Team Project</span>
      <p class="proj-title">Student Enrollment Patterns in a Public Affairs Graduate Program: A 10-Year Trend Analysis</p>
      <p class="proj-sub">Analysis of 10 years of student enrollment records across Department of Public Policy, Management, and Analytics's MPA, MPP, and MSCA programs — examining course sequencing, course load, time to degree, and shifting subject preferences.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag tag-blue">Capstone Project</span>
        <span class="proj-tag tag-amber">Descriptive Statistics · Trend Analysis</span>
        <span class="proj-tag tag-gray">Higher Ed · Program Evaluation</span>
        <span class="proj-tag tag-teal">R · Tableau · Quarto</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <span class="proj-arrow">→</span>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="projects/03-nonprofit-arts.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
<div class="proj-card">
  <span class="proj-num">03</span>
  <div>
    <span class="team-badge">Team Project</span>
    <span class="conf-badge">50th Annual STP&A Conference · October 2026</span>
    <p class="proj-title">When More Funding Is Not Enough: Revenue Concentration and Labor Investment in Nonprofit Performing Arts Organizations</p>
    <p class="proj-sub">Panel data analysis of 4,131 organization-year observations examining how revenue amount and concentration affect labor investment in nonprofit performing arts organizations — using SMU DataArts national dataset (2019–2024).</p>
    <div class="proj-tags">
      <span class="proj-tag tag-blue">Academic Paper</span>
      <span class="proj-tag tag-amber">Fixed Effects · HHI Analysis</span>
      <span class="proj-tag tag-gray">Nonprofit Labor · Finance · Arts Policy</span>
      <span class="proj-tag tag-teal">R · fixest · Quarto</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <span class="proj-arrow">→</span>
</div>
</a>

  <a href="projects/04-arts-education.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
<div class="proj-card">
  <span class="proj-num">04</span>
  <div>
    <p class="proj-title">Arts Education Equity in Chicago: A Data Analysis of Arts Access in Public Schools</p>
    <p class="proj-sub">ZIP code-level analysis of Creative Schools Certification (CSC) scores across Chicago, combining ACS data, spatial mapping, regression, an interactive Shiny dashboard, and a decision tree classifier to examine how socioeconomic conditions shape arts education access.</p>
    <div class="proj-tags">
  <span class="proj-tag tag-blue">Data Analysis Report</span>
  <span class="proj-tag tag-amber">Regression · Spatial Analysis</span>
  <span class="proj-tag tag-gray">Arts Education · Equity</span>
  <span class="proj-tag tag-teal">R · Shiny · Quarto · GitHub</span>
  </div>
  </div>
  <span class="proj-arrow">→</span>
</div>
</a>

<a href="projects/05-trauma-care.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
  <div class="proj-card">
    <span class="proj-num">05</span>
    <div>
      <p class="proj-title">A Policy Memo: Reducing Geographic Disparities in Trauma Care Access in Cook County</p>
      <p class="proj-sub">A policy memo diagnosing geographic disparities in trauma care access in Cook County through a five-step sequential model and evaluating four policy alternatives using a weighted decision matrix.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags">
  <span class="proj-tag tag-blue">Policy Memo</span>
  <span class="proj-tag tag-amber">Decision Matrix · BOTEC</span>
  <span class="proj-tag tag-gray">Public Health</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <span class="proj-arrow">→</span>
  </div>
  </a>
  
</div>

<div id="contact" class="contact-section">
  <p class="section-label">Contact</p>
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <div class="contact-row">
      <i class="ti ti-phone" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>(312) 771-1483</span>
    </div>
    <span class="contact-divider">·</span>
    <div class="contact-row">
      <i class="ti ti-mail" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>kimhaedodam@gmail.com</span>
    </div>
    <span class="contact-divider">·</span>
    <div class="contact-row">
      <i class="ti ti-brand-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/haedodamkim" target="_blank" style="color:#1a1a1a;">haedodamkim</a>
    </div>
    <span class="contact-divider">·</span>
    <div class="contact-row">
      <i class="ti ti-map-pin" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span>Chicago, IL</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
